title: Moving a Subitem to a new board and keeping updates/notes
excerpt: Currently we have an subitem automation in one board that when triggered moves the subitem to another board as a task. When the automation runs, any “updates/notes” made in the first board are erased. Is there a work aro…

posts.author: Virginia (Virginia Le)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently we have an subitem automation in one board that when triggered moves the subitem to another board as a task. When the automation runs, any “updates/notes” made in the first board are erased. Is there a work around for this?
